messages.content: 尊敬的顾客，我们收到您在app后台的反馈。感谢您对我们产品的喜爱，目前我已经将您的建议反馈给我们的产品经理。HHOGENE致力打造高质量有创意的产品，这一路上离不开您的支持。再次感谢您宝贵的建议，您的热爱是我们前行的动力。祝您生活愉快                                        基于上面的话 写一封英语邮件

Dear Customer,

Thank you for providing feedback through our app. We greatly appreciate your love for our product, and I have already forwarded your suggestion to our product manager. At HHOGENE, we are dedicated to creating high-quality and innovative products, and we couldn't have come this far without your support.

Once again, we sincerely thank you for your valuable input. Your passion is what drives us forward. Wishing you a joyful life.

Best regards,

Dear Customer,

Thank you for providing feedback through our app. We greatly appreciate your love for our product, and I have already forwarded your suggestion to our product manager. At HHOGENE, we are dedicated to creating high-quality and innovative products, and we couldn’t have come this far without your support.

Once again, we sincerely thank you for your valuable input. Your passion is what drives us forward. Wishing you a joyful life.

Best regards,  请润色

Subject: Thank you for your feedback!

Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out to us and providing feedback through our app. We truly appreciate your enthusiasm and support for our product. Rest assured that I have promptly shared your suggestions with our dedicated product manager.

At HHOGENE, our ultimate goal is to create high-quality and imaginative products that meet the needs and desires of our valued customers like you. Your feedback plays a vital role in helping us refine and enhance our offerings, and we sincerely appreciate your contribution.

Your ongoing support is invaluable to us. Your suggestions and love for our product inspire and motivate us to push boundaries and move forward on our journey to excellence. We are committed to continuing to exceed your expectations and deliver exceptional experiences.

Once again, we extend our heartfelt gratitude for taking the time to share your thoughts. Your enthusiasm and passion serve as a driving force for us, and we are honored to have you as a valued customer.

Wishing you a pleasant and fulfilling life.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]

尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成了困扰。由于我们公司并没有在希腊有直接地销售，所以目前无法直接发货至希腊。如果从中国给您补发猫厕所底座，耗时很长而且存在无法准确送达的风险，也需要您帮忙清关。我们服务的总是是客户第一，所以我给你两个方案选择，方案一：退还您80美元；方案二：给您从中国补发底座，但如上所述，存在无法送达的风险，也需要您帮忙清关。请您告诉我，您选择怎么样的方案呢。                      基于以上，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. As our company does not have direct sales in Greece, currently we are unable to ship the cat litter box base directly to Greece. If we were to send a replacement from China, it would take a considerable amount of time and there could be a risk of it not being accurately delivered. Additionally, it would require your assistance with customs clearance.

Customer satisfaction is our top priority, and we would like to offer you two options to choose from:

Option 1: Refund of $80.
Option 2: Sending the cat litter box base from China, but as mentioned earlier, this comes with the risk of it not being delivered accurately, and it would require your assistance with customs clearance.

Please let us know which option you would like to proceed with. We apologize for any inconvenience caused by this situation and appreciate your understanding.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]
我已经将您的问题反馈给我们的工程师，但是我们查询到您之前提供的设备id不准确，您是否将设备解绑，如果解绑的话，请您重新绑定后，将设备id告诉我们，如果一直绑定的话，也请您提供设备id。非常感谢您的支持        基于以上写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for bringing the issue to our attention. We have forwarded your problem to our engineers for further investigation. However, upon checking, we found that the device ID you previously provided was inaccurate. If you have unbound the device, please rebind it and provide us with the updated device ID. If you have not unbound the device, kindly provide the correct device ID.

We sincerely appreciate your ongoing support and apologize for any inconvenience caused. Your cooperation in providing the accurate device ID is crucial for us to resolve the issue promptly.

Thank you for your understanding and assistance.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]

尊敬的用户，感谢您的回复。目前，我向物流部门了解到，您的订单派件失败被退回。目前正在给您重新发货，收件地址如下：井上翔太
邮编：852-8053    
長崎県長崎市葉山2丁目48-13
日本
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>。给您造成不便，非常抱歉。         根据以上内容，写一封英文邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your response. We have checked with our logistics department and found that your order was returned due to failed delivery. We apologize for any inconvenience caused and would like to inform you that we are in the process of reshipping your order to the following address:

Recipient Name: Shota Inoue
Postal Code: 852-8053
Nagasaki, Nagasaki City, Hayama 2-chome 48-13
Japan
Phone: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>

We apologize for any inconvenience caused by this situation. 

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]

Dear Customer,

We have received your feedback from the HHOLOVE APP, can you describe your problem in detail? If you could record some videos, that would be easy for us to verify the issue.
Also please provide the below information for better locating the problems.
1. Which channel you bought the product: (Website or Amazon)
2. What is your order number: 
3. What is your device ID: (In the HHOLOVE APP)

Best,
Leo      将以上内容翻译成中文邮件

尊敬的顾客，

感谢您在HHOLOVE APP中提供的反馈。请您能详细描述您的问题吗？如果您能录制一些视频，有助于我们核实问题。

此外，请提供以下信息以更好地定位问题：
1. 您在哪个渠道购买产品：（网站或亚马逊）
2. 您的订单号是什么：
3. 您的设备ID是什么：（在HHOLOVE APP中找到）

非常感谢。

Leo
尊敬的用户，我们的Gpods里配备了4副耳塞。您可以选择其中一种。如果您有其他的建议，您可以具体的描述您的想法，反馈给我们。非常感谢您的支持与热爱。    就以上的内容写一封英文邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. Our Gpods come with four pairs of ear tips, and you can choose the one that best fits your preferences and comfort. If you have any other suggestions or specific ideas, please feel free to share them with us. We greatly appreciate your support and enthusiasm.

Thank you again for your continued support.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]
尊敬的用户，我们在app后台收到您的反馈。我们很抱歉，给您造成不好的体验。为了更好的解决问题，麻烦您提供一下详细的视频，以便我们排除和定位问题。HHOlove致力于提供安全放心的产品，我们非常感谢您的支持与热爱。再一次向您表示歉意，祝您生活愉快。                      就以上内容，写一封邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for providing feedback through our app. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused, and we are committed to resolving the issue for you. In order to better understand and address the problem, we kindly request you to provide us with a detailed video showcasing the issue. This will greatly assist us in troubleshooting and identifying the root cause.

At HHOlove, we are dedicated to delivering products that are safe and reliable, and we greatly appreciate your support and enthusiasm. Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience caused and wish you a pleasant life.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]
尊敬的用户，我们在app后台收到您的反馈。我们很抱歉，给您造成不好的体验。为了更好的解决问题，麻烦您提供一下详细的视频，以便我们排除和定位问题。HHOlove致力于提供安全放心的产品，我们非常感谢您的支持与热爱。再一次向您表示歉意，祝您生活愉快。 就以上内容，用中文写一封邮件

尊敬的用户，

我们收到了您在app后台的反馈。非常抱歉给您带来了不好的体验。为了更好地解决问题，我们需要您提供详细的视频，以帮助我们排除并定位问题。HHOlove一直致力于提供安全可靠的产品，并非常感谢您对我们的支持和热爱。再次向您表示诚挚的歉意，祝您生活愉快。

谢谢您的合作。

顺祝商祺，

[您的姓名]
[您的职位]
[公司名称]

尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成困扰。按照我们售后流程，我们在收到货物之后给您补发新的设备，目前物流显示仍在途中。但考虑您的情况，我给您申请立刻补发，但需要您提供SN码（设备底部可以查看到），也请您提供详细的收货地址（国家，洲/省，城市，具体地址），电话号码以及联系人情况。另外请您再次确认您paypal账号，我们收到您的信息后，也准备给您申请支付您垫付的邮费。再次感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。    基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. According to our after-sales process, we will send you a new device once we receive the returned item. The current logistics status shows that it is still in transit. However, considering your situation, I have requested an immediate reshipment for you. To proceed with this, we kindly request you to provide us with the SN code (located at the bottom of the device). Additionally, please provide us with your detailed shipping address (country, state/province, city, specific address), phone number, and contact person information. 

Furthermore, please confirm your PayPal account once again. Upon receiving the necessary information, we will also arrange for the reimbursement of the postage you paid. 

Thank you again for your cooperation, and we wish you a pleasant life.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]
尊敬的用户，感谢您的回复。我们的确查询到，快递已经被查收，如附件图片所展示。如果您这边没有收到，请您联系您当地的快递公司，或者询问周边的朋友是否有代收。再次麻烦您可以取消在klarna上的争议。祝您生活愉快。     用以上内容写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your response. We have indeed confirmed that the parcel has been delivered, as shown in the attached image. If you have not received it, we kindly request you to contact your local courier company or inquire with friends or neighbors who may have accepted the delivery on your behalf. We apologize for any inconvenience caused, and we would also appreciate it if you could cancel the dispute on Klarna. 

Wishing you a pleasant life.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]
